title: GuildZip
body:
# 📂 GuildZip 📂 *Your Hypixel guild chat, finally readable.*
[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-26.x-43A047?&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://www.minecraft.net/) [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-0.18+-DB6B2A?)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21-5382A1?&logo=openjdk&logoColor=white)](https://adoptium.net/) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-8B5CF6?)](LICENSE) [![Build](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Tjiba/GuildZip/build.yml?&logo=github&label=Build)](https://github.com/Tjiba/GuildZip/actions) [![Release](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Tjiba/GuildZip?&logo=github&label=Latest&color=22C55E)](https://github.com/Tjiba/GuildZip/releases)
![preview](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/39af7b73-32f2-4ae7-962c-0e8b86914a77) Need a bridge chat tool MC <-> Discord? - CLick here [Github](https://github.com/FrenchLegacy/Minecraft-Bridge-Chat)
--- GuildZip is a lightweight Fabric client mod that cleans up messy guild chat into clear, structured messages. Just install and enjoy — no setup needed.
## 🔄 What it does **Bridge message** ``` Guild > [MVP++] BotName: G > PlayerName: hey G > Bridge > PlayerName : hey ``` **Bridge with version tag** ``` Guild > [MVP++] BotName: [V2] G > PlayerName: gg G > V2 > PlayerName : gg ``` **Normal message** *(global mode)* ``` Guild > [MVP++] PlayerName: hello everyone G > PlayerName : hello everyone ```
## ✨ Features | | | |---|---| | 🤖 **Auto-detection** | Recognizes your bridge bot — no config needed | | 🏷️ **Version labels** | V1 / V2 / V3 each with its own custom color | | 🎨 **Full customization** | Rename aliases, style every element independently | | 🔁 **Duplicate compaction** | Repeated messages grouped as `(×2)`, `(×3)`... | | 🌐 **Global mode** | Format all guild messages, not just bridge | | 🔄 **Auto-updater** | Notified when a new version is available | | 🌍 **Bilingual** | Full English & French support |
## 📦 Requirements **Required** - Minecraft **1.21+** - Fabric Loader **0.18+** - Fabric API **Optional** *(for the graphical config screen)* - ModMenu - Cloth Config
## ⚙️ Commands | Command | Description | |---|---| | `/gz` | Open the config screen | | `/gz update` | Check for updates |
---
Made with ❤️ by **[Tjiba](https://github.com/Tjiba)** • MeteoFrance in-game rejoins notre guilde : [FrenchLegacy](https://frenchlegacy.fr) **[⬇ Download](https://github.com/Tjiba/GuildZip/releases)**  ·  **[🐛 Report a bug](https://github.com/Tjiba/GuildZip/issues)**  ·  **[📋 Changelog](https://github.com/Tjiba/GuildZip/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)**
*⭐ If GuildZip helps you, a review goes a long way!*
